hero.name: Shiyi Gou
hero.tagline: I connect people, technology, and design to build products that actually make sense.

about.heading: About
about.intro: I work at the intersection of people, technology, and design — using research to understand what users actually need, then translating that into products that are technically sound and genuinely usable.
highlights: One year of B2B program management experience, coordinating stakeholders and delivering learning programs for clients including d-fine, Rohde & Schwarz, and Allianz
Background spanning UX research, XR/robotics development, and data visualization — comfortable speaking the language of engineers, designers, and business stakeholders alike
Actively use AI-assisted workflows (prompt engineering, vibe coding) to move faster from idea to working prototype

portfolio.heading: Portfolio
portfolio.subheading: A selection of things I've built
